action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Brown, Anderson, Arney, Bare, Clancy, DeSanto, DeSmidt, Emerson, Fitzgerald, Goodwin, Hong, Hysell, J. Jacobson, Joers, Johnson, McCarville, Miresse, Neubauer, Roe, Sinicki, Tenorio and Udell; 
cosponsored by Senators Smith, Spreitzer, Dassler-Alfheim, Drake, Habush Sinykin, Hesselbein, Larson, Pfaff, Ratcliff, Roys, Keyeski and L. Johnson
